title: Supervise feedlot operations
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Supervise feedlot operations demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Select feedlot livestock

pcs.text: Consult workplace plans and management regarding the breeds, classes and numbers of livestock to be obtained for feedlot
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult workplace plans and management regarding the breeds, classes and numbers of livestock to be obtained for feedlot?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult workplace plans and management regarding the breeds, classes and numbers of livestock to be obtained for feedlot.

pcs.text: Select and purchase livestock for feedlot
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and purchase livestock for feedlot?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and purchase livestock for feedlot.

pcs.text: Inspect health and condition of livestock on delivery
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect health and condition of livestock on delivery?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect health and condition of livestock on delivery.

pcs.text: Complete and store documentation and records according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete and store documentation and records according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete and store documentation and records according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Select feedlot livestock
